# M5Cardputer Loader partition table (E: #  bootflag: 1 sector the loader sets to request a one-shot boot of ota_0.
#            The custom bootloader hook reads it: if set -> boot ota_0 once
#            and clear it; if not set -> wipe otadata so the LOADER (factory)
#            always boots. This defeats app self-validation (e.g. Bruce)
#            so RESET always returns to the loader.
#  factory : the LOADER firmware. Always the boot target unless bootflag set.
#  ota_0   : the runtime slot (selected firmware copied here
#  nvs     : the APP's NVS  (snapshotted per-firmware to /firmware/data/<fw>/).
